description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2 Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a check job that runs the command python checkcsv.py data/women-leaders-openness.csv. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs mkdir .public, cp -r * .public/, mv .public public, then executes sed 's/\( csv_path *[:=] *[\"'\''']data\/women-leaders-openness\.csv\)\([\"'\''']\)/\1?h='$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)'\2/' index.html >public/index.html and sed 's/\( csv_path *[:=] *[\"'\''']data\/women-leaders-openness\.csv\)\([\"'\''']\)/\1?h='$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)'\2/' map.html >public/map.html, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact. The pages job should only run on the master branch.
